title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock (Debugging)
description:
Stock prices change daily.
The program attempts to compute maximum possible profit but has initialization mistakes.

languages.python:
prices = list(map(int,input().split()))
min_price = 0
profit = 0
for p in prices:
 if p < min_price:
  min_price = p
 profit = max(profit, p - min_price)
print(profit)

title: Check if a Number is Perfect Number (Debugging)
description:
A perfect number is equal to the sum of its proper divisors.
The program tries to verify this but has errors.

languages.python:
n=int(input())
sum=0
for i in range(1,n):
 if n%i==0
  sum=sum+i
if sum=n:
 print("Perfect")
else
 print("Not Perfect")

title: Bubble Sort (Debugging)
description:
Bubble sort repeatedly swaps adjacent elements if they are in the wrong order.
The program below attempts to implement it but contains errors.

languages.python:
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
for i in range(n):
 for j in range(n-i):
  if a[j]>a[j+1]
   a[j],a[j+1]=a[j+1],a[j]
print(a)

title: Check if a Number is Armstrong (Debugging)
description:
An Armstrong number is equal to the sum of cubes of its digits.
The program attempts to check this but contains errors.

languages.python:
n=int(input())
sum=0
t=n
while n>0
 d=n%10
 sum=sum+d*d*d
 n=n/10
if sum=t:
 print("Armstrong")
else:
 print("Not Armstrong")
